base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of lunarian_moon — a tile from 1991 final fantasy iv. Moon overworld — Lunarian civilization + Giant of Bab-il + Lunar Core. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
